deliverables.description: Row-level crop stress audit output with exclusion flags, diagnostic road-distance scoring, and final blank index values because all cells are excluded.
Audit narrative with assumptions, exact packet citations, calculations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and decision table.
Row-level crop stress audit output with exclusion flags, diagnostic road-distance scoring, and final blank index values because all cells are excluded.

actual_outputs.logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.

task: Advanced task: Audit and produce a crop stress index CSV from the provided geospatial packet for three cells (A, B, C). Apply rules: exclude any cell with flood_depth > 1 m or slope > 10%. Rank/score lower distance to road as better. Produce crop_stress_index.csv and include all intermediate calculations, explicit assumptions, exceptions, exact row/value citations to the supplied packet, validation checks, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation to the supplied values. Do not invent additional records; mark any missing inputs as needs_review. The output must be reproducible using only the embedded packet (no external data lookups).
